title: add deployment-assist skill
description:
## Summary

- Adds `.claude/skills/deployment-assist/SKILL.md` — a new `/deployment-assist` skill
- Interactive 6-phase runbook: env selection → tool check → credential assessment → cluster status → gap table → sequential task execution
- Works from a fresh clone (nothing deployed) or partially-deployed environment
- Covers dev (`task workspace:up`) and prod (15-step ordered task list per env)
- Includes common blockers table for the most frequent failure modes

## Test plan

- [ ] Skill is auto-discovered in the Claude Code session (visible in system reminder)
- [ ] `/deployment-assist` invokes the skill and triggers Phase 0 env selection prompt
- [ ] No manifest or code changes — `task test:manifests` / `task test:unit` unaffected by this PR
